query:
SELECT d.id AS deal_id, d.title AS deal_title, d.contactId, d.pipelineId, d.stageId, d.createdAt AS deal_created,
       c.name, c.email, c.phone,
       ps.name AS stage_name, p.name AS pipeline_name
FROM deals d
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = d.contactId
JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.id = d.stageId
JOIN pipelines p ON p.id = d.pipelineId
ORDER BY d.id DESC
LIMIT 3;
command:

       c.name, c.email, c.phone,
       ps.name AS stage_name, p.name AS pipeline_name
FROM deals d
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = d.contactId
JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.id = d.stageId
JOIN pipelines p ON p.id = d.pipelineId
ORDER BY d.id DESC
